title: Good Morning Song for Kids | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
CLAP CLAP! Benny jumps up and sings GOOD MORNING!
Sing a cheerful nursery rhyme with Benny as he starts the day.
Toddlers and preschoolers practice brushing, waving, and smiling.
Kid-safe cartoon music for ages 2-8 in American English.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
